notes: Passive, generic utility - iterates every element with a 'class' attribute and removes any class exactly 'blur' or starting with 'blur-'. After running, always appends a '.myosint-v9-badge' attribution div (fixed bottom-right) showing the count and 'Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training'. Wikipedia's Gaussian Blur article is a stable page; there may be no blur classes to remove but the badge still appears.

checks.text_contains: Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training
checks.comment: V9 attribution badge always appears after the bookmarklet runs
Page should still have images present after running
